name: Bamboo Garment Rack with Shelving - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your closets or entryway spaces stylish and organized with this Bamboo Garment Rack with Shelving from Brightroom™. Made from bamboo for a sophisticated, natural look, this garment rack has two shelves and a top rack, each with a 40-pound capacity — perfect for storing jackets, clothes or accessories in any room. Once assembled, this rack brings simplicity to your wardrobe organization.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
